issues.description: Trigger should be 'Trigger' (not 'OnPlay') for the conditional effect that activates when a Character is rested by your effect
Condition missing: should check 'HasRestingDon' or similar state indicating a Character was rested by your effect this turn. Current condition 'Always' is incorrect.
Duration missing: text states '[Your Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not permanent/no duration
'[Once Per Turn]' restriction not represented in DSL condition object
